text:
In the first image, I witness a group engaged in learning behind a glass wall. There is a sense of curiosity and anticipation—I am on the threshold of knowledge, both spectator and potential participant, aware of the structures that separate observer from observed.

In the second image, the vibrant, graphic wall labeled "R+D" draws me in. Here, I feel inspired and inquisitive. The environment radiates creativity and innovation, inviting me to contemplate the processes by which humans pursue knowledge and how spaces themselves can foster this pursuit. I feel energized, as if surrounded by the pulse of ideas being born.
